titleStmt.title: SII 20.6: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 6. (B.K. No. 35 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the right wall of the Śaṁkha-basti at Basti-Baṇa.

summary.p: The record is dated in Śaka 651, 34th regnal year of the king, Phālguṇa, Paurṇimā, corresponding to A.D. 730, February 7, which was Tuesday.

It records the gift of the village of Kaddama to the south of Purikara-nagara for the worship of Saṁkha-Jinēndra and for the maintenance of a dāna-śālā in the temple. The gift was made by the king at the instance of his preceptor Niravadya-paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti jayatyāviḥkritaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrīmatāṁ sakaḷabhuvanasaṁstū
yamānamānavyasagōtrāṇāṁ hārītiputrāṇāṁ saptalōkamātṛbhiḥ saptamātṛbhirabhivarddhitānāṁ kārttikēyaparirakṣaṇaprāpta
kalyāṇaparaṁparāṇāṁ bhagavannārāyaṇaprasādasamāsāditavarāhalāṁchanakṣaṇēkṣaṇavaśīkṛtāśēṣamahībhṛtāṁ caḷukyā
nāṁ kuḷamaḷaṁkariṣṇōraśvamēdhāvabhṛthasnānapavitrīkritagātrasya śrīpolakēśivallabhamahārājasya sūnuḥ parākramākrānta
vanavāsyādiparanṛpatimaṁḍaḷapraṇibaddhaviśuddhakīrttiḥ śrīkīrttivarmmaprithvīvallabhamahārājasya sūnuḥ samarasaṁsaktasakaḷōttarā
pathēśvaraśrīharṣavarddhanaparājayōpalabdhaparamēśvarāparanāmadhēyasya satyāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvara
sya pṛ(pri)yatanayaḥ citrakaṇṭhākhyapravaraturaṁgamēṇaikēnaiva pratītānēkasaṁśritatrairājyakāṁcīpatibaḷamavaṣṭabhya karadīkritakēraḷapāra
śīkasiṁhaḷādidvīpādhipasya sakaḷōttarāpathanāthamathanōpārjjitōrjjitapāḷidhvajādisamastapāramaiśvaryyacihnasya vinayā
dityasatyāśrayaśrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarabhaṭṭārakasya priyātmajaḥ śaiśava vivādhigatānēkāstraśāstrō dakṣi
ṇāśāvijayini vitāmahē samunmūḷitanikhiḷakaṇṭakasaṁhatiruttarāpathavijigīśōrggurōragrata vivāhavavyāpāra
mācarannarātigajaghaṭāpāṭanaviśīryyamāṇakṛpāṇadhāraḥ samagravigrahāgrēsarasya sāhasarasikaḥ parāṅmukhīkṛtaśatrumaṇḍa
ḷaḥ gaṁgāyamnāpāḷidhvajapaḍhaḍhakkāmahāśabdacihnamāṇikyamataṁgajādīn pitrusātkurvvanparaiṟpaḷāyamānairāsādya kathamapi
vidhivaśādapanītōpi pratāpādēva viṣayaprakōpamarājakamutsārayanvatsarāja Ivānapēkṣitāparasahāyakasta
davagrahānnirggatya svabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhaprasādhitāśēṣaviśvaṁbharaḥ prabhurakhaṇḍitaśaktitrayatvācchatrumadabhaṁjanatvādudāratvānniravadya
tvātsamastabhuvanāśrayaḥ sakaḷapāramaiśvaryavyaktihētupāḷidhvajādyujvaḷaprājyarāja vijayādityasatyāśraya śrīpṛ
thvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarabhaṭṭārakaḥ sarvvānēvamājñāpayati viditamastu vōsmābhi Ēkapaṁcāśaduttaraṣaṭchatēṣu śakavarṣēṣva
tītēṣu pravarttamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsarē catustriṁśē varttamānē śrīraktapuramadhivasati vijayaskaṁdhāvārē phālguṇamāsē paurṇnamā
syāṁ śrīmūlasaṁghānvaya dēvagaṇasudhāsamudracaṁdrasya svaparamatavēditaḥ śrī pūjyapādasyāṁtēvāsinaḥ Udayadēvapaṁḍitasya śrī ni
ravadyapaṇḍitākhyayatipatiḥ svagurōḥ dharmmōpadēśinaḥ śrīmatpurikaranagaraprakhyātaśrīśaṁkhajinēṁdranityanaimittikapūjānimittaṁ taddā�śālāpra
vartanārtthaṁ taṁ nagarāddakṣiṇadigbhāgē kaddamagrāmaṁ dattavān . tasya sīmāsamākhyāyatē . pūrvvataḥ snuhi nimna samīpasya pāṣāṇapuṁjikā . ta
ddakṣiṇataḥ pāṣāṇataṭākaṁ . taddakṣiṇataḥ bhūsaraḥ . taddakṣiṇataḥ hiccagegrāmapathānnirggatajaḷapravāhaṁ tataḥ pāvakadiśi mayūrakoṁḍi .
tatpaścimataḥ kannīrasaraḥ tatpaścimataḥ . jaṁbukasaraḥ tatpaci mataḥ bhūmisaraḥ . tatpaścimataḥ sabaniyataṭākadakṣiṇakoṁḍiḥ . tatō nairṟutyāṁ diśi taṁci is written below ma in smaller characters.
ḍasasaraḥ . taduttarataḥ . pāṣāṇapuṁjikābhūmisaraḥ . taduttarataḥ kandhārīsaraḥ . taduttarataḥ mānyasaraḥ . taduttarataḥ . kārasaraḥ . tatō vāya
vyāṁ diśiavullapathaḥ . tatpūrvataḥ . khaniparvvataḥ . tatpūrvvataḥ . raktapāṣāṇakaṁdaraḥ . tatpūrvvataḥ . muḍukatacākaṁ . tatpūrvataḥ khiḷiparvvataḥ tatpūrvvataḥ
nimnamadyakriṣṇagapāṣāṇaghaṭṭaṁ tatpūrvataḥ . paṁcavaṭagarttaṁ . tatpaścimasyāṁ diśi hiccagegrāmapathātpaścimataḥ pāṣāṇapuṁjikā tataḥ pa
pāṣāṇapuṁjikā sīmā na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhuḥ dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁ
svaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
